headline: Dividend Stocks Won the War. Why They Could Also Win the Peace.
summary: Stocks that pay generous dividends should help investors stay calm—no matter what the world throws at them this year.

headline: Chubb Names Kevin Rampe Global Head of Claims
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today announced that Kevin Rampe has been named Senior Vice President, Chubb Group, Global Claims Officer, responsible for global claims management. The appointment is effective immediately. Rampe will also retain his responsibilities as Head of North America Claims.

raw.headline: Chubb Names Kevin Rampe Global Head of Claims
raw.summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) today announced that Kevin Rampe has been named Senior Vice President, Chubb Group, Global Claims Officer, responsible for global claims management. The appointment is effective immediately. Rampe will also retain his responsibilities as Head of North America Claims.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Chubb, Lowers Price Target to $321
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Chubb (NYSE:CB) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $322 to $321.

raw.headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Chubb, Lowers Price Target to $321
raw.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains Chubb (NYSE:CB) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $322 to $321.

headline: Driving less and cyling more? Here's how to insure your bicycle, e-bike or moped

headline: U.S. Pet Insurance Market Growth Slows In 2025, But Still Robust
summary: The US pet insurance market once again expanded by more than 10% in 2025, a feat that it has achieved every year since at least 2018.

raw.headline: U.S. Pet Insurance Market Growth Slows In 2025, But Still Robust
raw.summary: The US pet insurance market once again expanded by more than 10% in 2025, a feat that it has achieved every year since at least 2018.
